base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_1_2 — a tile (level_layout) from 1988 super mario bros 2. World 1-2 — horizontal-scroll grassland. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: World 1-2 — horizontal-scroll grassland; Albatoss flying-enemy section
